nodes.name: Red-chested flufftail
nodes.summary: Red-chested flufftail（Red-chested flufftail，学名 Sarothrura rufa），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括湿地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: |date=2019-02-01 |title=Camera-trapping successfully and non-invasively reveals the presence, activity and habitat choice of the Critically Endangered White-winged Flufftail Sarothrura ayresi in a South African high-altitude wetland |journal=Bird Conservation International |volume=29 |issue=3 |pages=463–478 |doi=10.1017/s0959270918000400 |s2cid=92372815 |issn=0959-2709}} It can be found in environments near white-winged flufftails, but tends to avoid direct spacial overlap
